versions.description: A set of commands to allow players to set their own teleport points and teleport to them.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"timeout":{"title":"Timeout","description":"The time one has to wait before teleporting again.","x-component":"duration","type":"number","minimum":0,"default":1000},"allowPublicTeleports":{"type":"boolean","description":"Players can create public teleports.","default":false}},"required":[],"additionalProperties":false}

commands.name: teleport
commands.helpText: Teleports to one of your set locations.

commands.name: tplist
settp
commands.helpText: Sets a location to teleport to.

commands.name: deletetp
setpublic
commands.helpText: Sets a teleport to be public, allowing other players to teleport to it.

commands.name: setprivate
commands.helpText: Sets a teleport to be private, only the teleport owner can teleport to it.

commands.name: setwaypoint
deletewaypoint
listwaypoints
teleportwaypoint
commands.helpText: Placeholder command, this will not be used directly. The module will install aliases for this command corresponding to the waypoint names.

cronJobs.name: Waypoint reconciler

functions.name: utils

permissions.description: Allows the player to create public teleports.
Allows the player to use teleports modules.
Allows creating, deleting, and managing waypoints.
